findings.custom_domain_issue: 🔴 DNS/Network timeout on all 4 custom domain endpoints
findings.root_cause: Custom domains (fms-audit.dsc-in.com, fms-discord.dsc-in.com, fms-travel.dsc-in.com, fms-bm.dsc-in.com) not resolving or unreachable from this network

recommendation: Verify DNS configuration and CDN/load balancer settings for custom domains. Main Vercel deployment is stable.
